AniWorld Downloader

Appearance

AniWorld DownloaderWatch, download, and keep your library current.

Use the Web UI, terminal menu, CLI, or Docker. Pick the one that fits your setup.

Get Started
Open on GitHub
Join Discord

Web UI

Search supported sites, choose episodes, manage the queue, and browse completed downloads.

Terminal and CLI

Use the interactive menu or pass URLs directly for scripts and headless systems.

Automation

Keep series updated with Auto-Sync, watch planned releases, or accept Discord requests.

Flexible setup

Install the recommended Python package or run the ready-made Docker image on a server or NAS.

Where to begin ​

I want to...Go here
Install and run the appGet Started
Use the browser interfaceWeb UI
Run commands or scriptsCommand Line
Change paths, languages, providers, or authConfiguration
Run a server or NAS setupDocker
Import AniWorld Downloader in PythonPython API
Fix a problemTroubleshooting

A quick note

Supported sites and stream hosters are third-party services. Their availability can change without an AniWorld Downloader update.

AniWorld Downloader is open source.

Released under the MIT License.
